creator: dog@virtual.org.ua
text:
I tried to install games/teeworlds but it fails with the following error:

c++ -o mastersrv  objs/mastersrv/mastersrv.o objs/engine/shared/ringbuffer.o objs/engine/shared/snapshot.o objs/engine/shared/network_console.o objs/engine/shared/kernel.o objs/engine/shared/linereader.o objs/engine/shared/network.o objs/engine/shared/demo.o objs/engine/shared/network_client.o objs/engine/shared/filecollection.o objs/engine/shared/netban.o objs/engine/shared/datafile.o objs/engine/shared/network_server.o objs/engine/shared/console.o objs/engine/shared/network_conn.o objs/engine/shared/masterserver.o objs/engine/shared/memheap.o objs/engine/shared/engine.o objs/engine/shared/huffman.o objs/engine/shared/map.o objs/engine/shared/config.o objs/engine/shared/mapchecker.o objs/engine/shared/econ.o objs/engine/shared/packer.o objs/engine/shared/compression.o objs/engine/shared/storage.o objs/engine/shared/network_console_conn.o objs/engine/shared/jobs.o objs/base/system.o objs/engine/external/zlib/uncompr.o objs/engine/external/zlib/inftrees.o objs/engine/external/zlib/com

How-To-Repeat: Try to install games/teeworlds under the FreeBSD 10.0-BETA3 amd64
